headline: TA Connections Expands Disrupted Passenger Support for Aircalin Across Its Global Network
summary: ATLANTA, March 31, 2026--TA Connections, today announced the expansion of its disrupted passenger support services for Aircalin, the international airline of New Caledonia.

headline: Bicara Therapeutics To Rally Around 121%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Top analysts changed outlook on top names. See all changes on analyst ratings page. BTIG & HCW cut price targets, Needham & BMO raised, Baird bcut.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Corpay, Lowers Price Target to $380
summary: Baird  analyst David Koning   maintains Corpay (NYSE:CPAY) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $440 to $380.
